introSection: Pirate's Gold Rush is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Playland's Castaway Cove in Ocean City, New Jersey, USA. The ride opened on July 29, 2013.
fullText: Pirate's Gold Rush is an E&F Miler Industries kiddie roller coaster located at Playland's Castaway Cove in Ocean City, New Jersey, USA. The ride opened on July 29, 2013.
